name: ER Simulator
description:
Random Idea bots: pt 1

____________

Have you ever wanted to create a story within the confines of a sterile, controlled, medical emergency facility??? Perhaps striking thrilling drama amongst co-workers, or expressing an emergency apart of your own OCs backstory?

Great!! Because thats what this bot is for! Or, well, literally anything your mind can conjure up!

____________

This bot is apart of a weekly series im doing where I take a random idea from my mind and simply. Create a bot from it!

____________

Message 1: you make the story.

Message 2: story is set, gender neutral pronouns

Message 3: story is set, feminine pronouns

Message 4: story is set, masculine pronouns.

______________
creator: Rav-the-bish
